name: python3-outcome
title: python3-outcome
summary: capture the outcome of Python function calls
description:
capture the outcome of Python function calls
Outcome provides a function `capture' for capturing the outcome of a Python
function call, so that it can be passed around - even if the function raises
an exception. It also provides the async equivalent function `acapture'.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-outcome because capture the outcome of Python function calls.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-outcome as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-outcome with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-outcome --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
